# Required phase-mode scenarios (R34) — each line maps to an OK line in run-deliver-fixtures.sh

resume:deliver-phase-resume-reconcile
frozen-guard:deliver-phase-frozen-guard
mode-detect:deliver-mode-detect-phase
deny:deliver-phase-deny

interrupt-lock:deliver-phase-interrupt-lock
async-review:deliver-phase-merge-gate-barrier
base-preflight:deliver-phase-base-preflight-pass

merge-method:deliver-phase-ancestry-check
contention-cycle:deliver-phase-contention-cycle-detect
branch-type:deliver-phase-branch-type
